heading: Report to Congress on sexual exploitation of children
label: 41301 Report to Congress on sexual exploitation of children
text: Beginning one hundred and twenty days after , and every year thereafter, the Attorney General shall report to the Congress on prosecutions, convictions, and forfeitures under chapter 110 of title 18.May 21, 1984
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified as a note under , Judiciary and Judicial Procedure, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 522 of Title 28
